title: Dhumrapaan
desc: The smoking area of a corporate becomes the place where a bunch of employees gather to relieve stress and depict the challenges faced by office-goers. S01 E12.

title: Khamosh! Adalat Jari Hai
desc: A mock trial during the rehearsal of a play quickly turns into a gripping drama about desire, gender issues, power and control. S01 E31.

title: Jana Tha Roshanpura
desc: Bound by loss, a father-in-law and son-in-law navigate grief under one roof. S01 E66.

title: Bombed
desc: Happy-go-lucky Zed's life turns upside down when Inspector Damle forces him to become involved in the search for his half-brother who is a wanted terrorist. S01 E132.

title: Rudali
desc: Sanichari is a resilient Dalit widow who fights against all odds to find a better life in the face of poverty and discrimination by becoming a rudali or professional mourner. S01 E64.

title: Kanyadaan
desc: Set in the 70s, daughter of a freedom fighter, decides to marry a Dalit. However, things go south as she realises the guy isn't what she thought. S01 E93.
